hero.title: Transform Your Body
hero.subtitle: Expert-led coaching for men and women. Whether you're a beginner or elite, we engineer custom protocols for sustainable fat loss and muscle hypertrophy.

about.label: Meet Kyle
about.name: Kyle Belk
about.heading: Transforming bodies,
about.bio1: I'm Kyle Belk — a certified personal trainer from Atlanta, GA with 7 years of coaching experience. I've helped over 500 clients shed fat, build muscle, and completely rewrite their relationship with their body.
about.bio2: My approach is simple: no cookie-cutter plans. Every program I build is rooted in your unique metabolism, schedule, and goals.
about.quote: Your body is capable of more than your mind believes.

bmi.label: Free Fitness Tool
bmi.title: Calculate Your
bmi.description: Knowing your BMI is the foundational step toward effective weight management. Use our advanced BMI calculator to accurately assess your current metrics, then let Kyle Belk engineer a custom fitness plan to transform your physique.
bmi.descUnderweight: Your BMI indicates you are underweight. Focus on a muscle-building protocol and a structured caloric surplus. Kyle can engineer a mass gain plan tailored specifically for your metabolism.
bmi.descNormal: Great foundational metrics. At a normal weight, it is time to optimize body composition by strategically increasing lean muscle mass while torching stubborn fat.
bmi.descOverweight: Your BMI falls into the overweight category. A structured fat loss program focusing on macros and strength training will get you back to optimal levels efficiently.
bmi.descObese: Sustainable fat loss starts with a definitive, scalable plan. Kyle specializes in profound body transformations, providing the exact blueprint needed for your success.

transformations.label: Real Results
transformations.title: Client
transformations.description: Every result is real. No filters, no tricks — just dedicated clients and a proven system.

testimonials.label: Client Stories
testimonials.title: Real People.
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by 500+ clients across the US.
testimonials.t1: Kyle completely changed how I think about fitness. I'd tried everything before — keto, fasting, random YouTube programs. None of it stuck. In 16 weeks with Kyle, I lost 42 pounds and actually understand WHY it worked.
testimonials.t2: As a mom of two with zero time, I needed something that actually fit my life. Kyle built around my schedule, my stress levels, even my meal preferences. Down 28 lbs and I feel stronger than I did in my 20s.
testimonials.t3: I came to Kyle as a skinny guy who'd been lifting for 2 years with no results. He identified the exact issues with my training and nutrition. 20 weeks later — 18 pounds of muscle and a completely different physique.
testimonials.t4: The check-ins, the adjustments, the accountability — Kyle is always there. I never felt like just another client. He genuinely cares about your progress. Best investment I've ever made.
testimonials.t5: Kyle prepped me for my first NPC show. The man knows competition prep better than anyone I've worked with. Walked on stage at 4.8% body fat and placed first in my class. Unreal.

contact.label: Apply For Coaching
contact.title: Begin Your
contact.description: Ready to elevate your physique? Connect with Atlanta's premier professional trainer. Fill out the application below, and Kyle will review your goals to engineer a highly customized roadmap for your success.
contact.step1Desc: Kyle personally analyzes your intake form within 24 hours.
contact.step2Desc: A free 20-minute consultation directly with Kyle to align on goals.
contact.step3Desc: Receive a custom structural overview of your potential program.
contact.formSubtitle: Secure your spot for a transformative coaching experience.
contact.contextPlaceholder: Share your current situation, any challenges, and what you've tried previously...
contact.successDesc: Kyle will review your application and reach out within 24 hours. Your transformation protocol is initiating.

packagesHero.label: Coaching Programs
packagesHero.title: Choose Your
packagesHero.description: Every package includes a personalized plan built specifically for your body, goals, and schedule. No cookie-cutter templates. No excuses.

pricingCards.guaranteeDesc: — if you follow the plan and don't see results, Kyle will refund you.

packagesProcess.label: How It Works
packagesProcess.title: The
packagesProcess.s1Desc: A 20-minute strategy call with Kyle to discuss your goals, current fitness level, and lifestyle. No sales pitch — just real conversation.
packagesProcess.s2Desc: Within 48 hours, Kyle delivers your fully personalized training and nutrition program — built specifically for your body and goals.
packagesProcess.s3Desc: You start your program with full access to exercise video demonstrations, tracking tools, and Kyle's direct support.
packagesProcess.s4Desc: Regular check-ins, progress tracking, and plan adjustments ensure you're always moving forward — never plateauing.
packagesProcess.s5Desc: Reach your goal, document your results, and decide on your next phase. Many clients continue — the transformation never has to stop.

packagesFAQ.title: Questions &
packagesFAQ.subtitle: Have more questions? Don't hesitate to email us:
packagesFAQ.q1: Do I need gym access to work with Kyle?
packagesFAQ.a1: No — Kyle builds programs for home, gym, or hybrid setups. During the consultation call, he'll ask about your equipment and build your plan accordingly.
packagesFAQ.q2: How fast will I see results?
packagesFAQ.a2: Most clients notice visible changes within 3-4 weeks. Significant transformations typically occur at the 8-12 week mark. Results depend on your consistency and adherence to the plan.
packagesFAQ.q3: What if I travel or have an irregular schedule?
packagesFAQ.a3: Kyle specializes in building flexible programs for busy people. Your plan will account for travel, work schedules, and life's unpredictability with workout alternatives.
packagesFAQ.q4: Is online coaching as effective as in-person?
packagesFAQ.a4: For most goals, yes — and often more convenient. Kyle's online clients average the same results as in-person clients because the programming, accountability, and communication are identical.
packagesFAQ.q5: Can I switch packages after I start?
packagesFAQ.a5: Absolutely. Many clients start with Starter and upgrade to Transform once they see results. Kyle will always recommend the right package for your current phase.
packagesFAQ.q6: What does the 90-day guarantee actually mean?
packagesFAQ.a6: If you complete all check-ins, follow your nutrition plan, and train as prescribed for 90 days without seeing measurable progress, Kyle will refund your investment — no questions asked.

hero.title: THE BLUEPRINT FOR TOTAL
hero.subtitle: Most trainers give you a template. I give you a science-based protocol engineered for your specific physiology. No fluff. Just results.

story.label: The Narrative
story.title: Results aren't born. They're engineered.
story.content1: I didn't start as an elite trainer. I started as a guy frustrated with the lack of clarity in the fitness industry. I spent years navigating fad diets, high-volume nonsense, and programs with zero accountability. I had to break the system to build one that actually works.
story.content2: Belk Body Lab was born from a simple realization: your body is a biological machine. If you give it the right inputs—scientific training, metabolic nutrition, and ironclad accountability—the output is guaranteed. 7 years later, I've helped over 500 people rewrite their limits.
story.mission: My mission is simple: to stop the guesswork and start the transformation.

philosophy.label: The Standards
philosophy.title: The Belk Body Lab Philosophy
philosophy.p1Desc: No 'feeling the burn' for the sake of it. Every rep is calculated to trigger maximum muscle hypertrophy or metabolic stress. We train with intent.
philosophy.p2Desc: Flexible dieting isn't an excuse to eat trash. It's a method to ensure sustainability while hitting the exact macros your body needs to thrive and shed fat.
philosophy.p3Desc: You aren't a number in a spreadsheet. I provide weekly check-ins, real-time adjustments, and zero-bullshit feedback to keep you on the path.

lifestyle.label: Inside the Lab
lifestyle.title: More Than Just Lifting.
lifestyle.content: Progress happens when discipline becomes a routine. When I'm not coaching, I'm researching the latest in muscle physiology, training for my next show, or helping the next generation of athletes find their edge. The lab never stops.

finalCta.title: READY TO STOP THE
finalCta.description: I only take on a limited number of clients who are serious about their transformation. If you're ready to put in the work, I'll provide the blueprint.

hero.title: FITNESS INSIGHTS &
hero.subtitle: Stop guessing. Start understanding the science behind your physique. Expert guides on hypertrophy, fat loss, and metabolic health.
